'''Iscera''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planet near [[Issor]] and [[Nysza III]]. [[Fable Astin/Legends|Fable Astin]] saw [[Jaalib Brandl]] perform in a play on this planet. It was a dry planet lacking any legal establishments that sold [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]].<ref name="SWAJ8" />

{{Planet-stub}}
